title: Toggleable Locator
description: A mod for disabling and manually toggling between the XP bar and the Locator bar
body:
# Toggleable Locator

**Version:** 1.0.0

---
![TR Demo](https://i.imgur.com/BklJsCH.gif)

---
# 1.1B Changelog

- Configuration through MidnightConfig GUI

- Switching on/off

- Added functionality for switching off the Bar & Level numbers

- Jump strength now used on Jumpable vehicles instead of Experience bar

- Now requires MidnightLib
---
## Description

Toggleable Locator is a Minecraft Fabric mod for version 1.21.6 that allows players to manually switch between the Experience bar and the Locator bar on the in-game HUD. This gives more control over which bar is displayed, improving the gameplay experience for those who don't like how it works in original.

---

## Features

- Manual toggle between Experience bar and Locator bar using a customizable keybind (default: R).
- Languages:Russian, English.
- Lightweight and client-side only — no server-side dependencies.
- Simple and intuitive interface with notification messages when toggling.

---

## Installation

1. Ensure you have `Fabric Loader` installed for Minecraft 1.21.6.
2. Install `Fabric API`.
3. Download the Toggleable Radar mod `.jar` file.
4. Place the mod `.jar` file into your `mods` folder.
5. Launch Minecraft with the Fabric profile.
6. Use the default keybind `R` or configure your own in the controls menu to toggle between the XP and Locator bars.

---
